5005.issue: [S5005] Plain setTimeout() found in source files (lib/discovery.js, [main.js](https://github.com/Jey-Cee/ioBroker.deconz/blob/master/main.js)). Please use this.setTimeout() or adapter.setTimeout() instead.

5039.issue: [W5039] "admin/words.js" found but not referenced anywhere. File seems to be outdated, please consider removing it.

5051.issue: [S5051] Custom sleep/wait function(s) found in source files (main.js). Consider using the built-in "this.delay()" method provided by the ioBroker adapter base class instead.
